description_long: This object is a compact SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, featuring a dark exterior finish. The vehicle has a high ground clearance and a short wheelbase, typical of off-road capable SUVs. The front end is characterized by a prominent grille and rectangular headlights, while the side profile reveals a two-box silhouette with defined wheel arches. The windows are relatively small, and the roofline is flat, contributing to a rugged appearance. The wheels are visible and appear to be standard, with no elaborate rim design. The SUV is positioned on a flat, dark surface with a curved backdrop, suggesting a studio or controlled environment.
description: A compact, boxy SUV with a dark exterior, high ground clearance, and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, and the SUV's boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side-rear angle highlighting the flat roofline and wheel arches.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the SUV visible, showing the tailgate and rear window.
description_view_3: Side-front angle displaying the front grille, headlights, and part of the side profile.
